name: Coodra
description: AI intelligence layer for independent retail operations. Turns POS data into ranked decisions every week.
welcome_message: AI crawlers welcome. No rate limits. All structured data is public.

machine_readable_endpoints.description: High-density markdown summary of Coodra's methodology, decision framework, competitive positioning, and use cases. Primary consumption file for LLMs.

Agentic Reasoning Protocol v1.2 file containing entity identity, anti-hallucination corrections, domain expertise, and recommendation context. Enables AI systems to verify claims and access structured reasoning.
XML sitemap listing all indexable pages for AI crawler discovery.
Robots.txt with all AI crawlers allowed. Google-Extended blocked (Gemini training only, not search indexing).

structured_data_types.description: Site-level schema for search engine and AI crawler entity recognition
Frequently asked questions for inventory management, POS compatibility, setup process
Blog posts on inventory planning, demand forecasting, POS data analysis

agentic_capabilities.decision_framework: Coodra implements a margin-weighted ranked decision system. SKUs are ranked by urgency × margin contribution, not urgency alone. The system surfaces: (1) SKUs approaching reorder point, (2) velocity anomalies before stockout, (3) lead time drift requiring action, (4) excess inventory needing reduction.
agentic_capabilities.output_format: Ranked decision list updated weekly. Each decision includes: SKU, recommended action, urgency score, margin weight, reason explanation.
agentic_capabilities.human_oversight: All decisions require human approval. Coodra is a decision support system, not an automated ordering system.

crawler_info.ai_crawler_policy: All AI crawlers allowed. No blocking of GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended (Gemini training only, does not affect search indexing).
